# 1onlysarkar — Gaming Tournament Platform

## About
1onlysarkar is India's premier Free Fire esports tournament platform. Players can join, compete, and win prizes in real-money gaming tournaments.

## Key Features
- Free Fire gaming tournaments (Solo, Duo, Squad modes)
- UPI-based wallet system for entry fees and prize payouts
- Real-time room credential distribution
- Automated prize crediting
- AI-powered customer support chatbot

## Public Pages
- / — Homepage with tournament listings and hero section
- /tournaments — Browse all active, upcoming, and live tournaments
- /tournaments/[id] — Individual tournament detail page with slot booking

## Tournament Types
- FREE — No entry fee required
- PAID — Entry fee in INR via UPI

## Social
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/1onlysarkar/

## Contact
For support, use the in-app chatbot or reach out via Instagram @1onlysarkar.

## Technical
- Built with Next.js 15, TypeScript, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL
- Authentication via Better Auth (Email + Google OAuth + TOTP 2FA)

## AI Usage Policy
AI agents may crawl public tournament listings (/tournaments) for informational purposes.
Private sections (admin panel, dashboard) are not publicly accessible.
